ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "playing_style" TEXT /* Playing style of the player (e.g., aggressive, defensive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "team_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coaching style of the coach (e.g., strategic, tactical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tournament took place */,
  "game_title" TEXT /* Game title for the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" INTEGER /* Prize pool for the tournament */,
  "tournament_format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., round-robin, single-elimination) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_game_title FOREIGN KEY ("game_title") REFERENCES game_titles ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament result */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the result is for */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the tournament */,
  "comp_score" INTEGER /* Competitive score of the player */,
  "rounds_won" INTEGER /* Number of rounds won by the player */,
  "game_stats" TEXT /* In-game statistics (e.g., kills, deaths, assists) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_results_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_results_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_titles" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game title */,
  "game_title" TEXT /* Name of the game title */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the game was released */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode (e.g., multiplayer, single-player) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total competitive score of the player */,
  "total_rounds_won" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds won by the player */,
  "average_rank" REAL /* Average rank of the player across tournaments */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the player */,
  "loss_rate" REAL /* Loss rate of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the system module */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to team 1 */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to team 2 */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time the match was played */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the team */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the team */,
  "gold_earned" INTEGER /* Total gold earned by the team */,
  "xp_earned" INTEGER /* Total experience points earned by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
